prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海财经大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4266名→4410名→4600名→5731名→5410名，整体呈后移趋势，2024年出现明显下滑至5731名后，2025年回升至5410名，近两年波动幅度约321名。2025年基准位次约5410名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021年235人、2022年238人、2023年236人、2024年282人、2025年298人，持续扩招；2026年计划增至319人，较2025年增加21人，扩招约7%，一定程度上缓解了竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第33–35名（2026年排名第35），属于国内顶尖财经类院校，非985但财经领域影响力突出，对高分考生吸引力强；2026年声誉文件中未出现上海财经大学的明显负面或正面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第99位，评价为"一般"，综合热度约13.3万，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；历史投档异常记录中无该校断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，共4个A-及以上学科，财经学科实力位居全国前列，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业2024年热度评估为"分化观望"，较2023年小幅升温；会计/财务/审计类专业评估为"推荐"；整体财经类专业社会热度平稳偏暖。上海市2026年普通高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，竞争显著加剧；上海财经大学在上海市招生占比约18–20%（2025年298/1633≈18.2%），作为本地顶尖财经院校，本市考生报考意愿较强，本地生源占比稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年扩招约7%的缓解作用、以及上海市考生数大幅增加约35.4%带来的竞争加剧，考虑考生增幅远超扩招幅度，竞争压力净增加，预计最低录取位次小幅前移（更难进）。预测2026年最低位次约5559名，区间5059–6059名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融学（双学士学位）（金融学-统计学双学士学位）
- 会计学
- 法学（双学士学位）（法学-金融学双学士学位）
- 统计学类（含统计学基地班、经济统计学、数据科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 财务管理（智能化）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 数学类（含信息与计算科学、数学与应用数学）
- 经济学（含经济学、经济学-信息与计算科学双学士学位）
- 财政学类（含财政学、税收学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（含工商管理、人力资源管理、市场营销等）
- 公共管理类（含行政管理、劳动与社会保障）
- 国际经济与贸易
- 投资学（含投资学、房地产开发与管理）
- 马克思主义理论（双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5059–6059名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业作为冲刺（位次明显优于区间下限时可重点冲击金融学双学位、会计学等王牌专业），三档专业作为保底。上财财经类学科实力突出，应用经济学和工商管理均为A+，建议优先考虑与这两大学科相关的专业方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai University of Finance and Economics in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 4266 → 4410 → 4600 → 5731 → 5410, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, there was a significant drop to 5731, followed by a recovery to 5410 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 321 positions in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5410. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Shanghai was 235 in 2021, 238 in 2022, 236 in 2023, 282 in 2024, and 298 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan increases to 319, an increase of 21 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 7%, which to some extent alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable at 33–35 in recent years (ranked 35th in 2026). It is a top domestic finance and economics institution, not a 985 university but with outstanding influence in the finance field, strongly attracting high-scoring students. In the 2026 reputation document, there were no significant negative or positive public opinion events related to Shanghai University of Finance and Economics. Its Douyin popularity ranks 99th overall, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 133,000, indicating a medium-to-low level of short video exposure, with no abnormal surge in application attention. There are no records of historical admission anomalies such as gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Business Administration received A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, and Statistics A-, totaling 4 disciplines rated A- or above, placing its finance and economics disciplines among the top in the country, providing sustained attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of finance/finance/economics majors was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', with a slight warming compared to 2023. Accounting/finance/auditing majors were assessed as 'recommended'. Overall, the social popularity of finance and economics majors is stable and slightly warm. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination students in Shanghai is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Shanghai University of Finance and Economics accounts for about 18–20% of enrollment in Shanghai (298/1633 ≈ 18.2% in 2025). As a top local finance and economics institution, local students have a strong willingness to apply, and the proportion of local students remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the mitigating effect of a 7% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 35.4% increase in the number of Shanghai candidates, with the increase in candidates far exceeding the expansion rate, the net competitive pressure increases. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking will slightly move forward (harder to enter). The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 5559, with a range of 5059–6059.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Finance (Double Degree) (Finance-Statistics Double Degree)
- Accounting
- Law (Double Degree) (Law-Finance Double Degree)
- Statistics (including Statistics Base Class, Economic Statistics, Data Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Financial Management (Intelligent)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Mathematics (including Information and Computing Science, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics)
- Economics (including Economics, Economics-Information and Computing Science Double Degree)
- Public Finance (including Public Finance, Taxation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Marketing, etc.)
- Public Administration (including Administrative Management, Labor and Social Security)
- International Economics and Trade
- Investment (including Investment, Real Estate Development and Management)
- Marxist Theory (Double Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5059–6059, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch (when the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on applying for top majors like Finance Double Degree and Accounting), and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. SUFE has outstanding finance and economics disciplines, with Applied Economics and Business Administration both rated A+. It is recommended to prioritize majors related to these two disciplines.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics
